title: juncus micranthus
intro: Juncus micranthus, also known as Dwarf Rush or Small Flowered Rush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Juncaceae, commonly found in wetlands and coastal areas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and aiding in wound healing. The health benefits of Juncus micranthus include its ability to reduce fever, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is used in traditional herbal remedies, such as salves and poultices, to harness its medicinal properties.
